    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractDefinition<D extends Definition>
     
    final class 
    DefinitionId<D extends Definition>
    A definition is identified by an id called DefinitionId This id is composed of - a prefix - a shortName - a link towards the Definition fullName = prefix + shortName
    interface 
    SimpleEnumDefinitionProvider<D extends Definition>
    Provides a list of definitions through an enum.
